extraction.one_line_summary: BERNAL Egan won Stage 19 when race was neutralized at Col de l'Iseran summit due to hailstorm, taking yellow jersey despite ALAPHILIPPE closing gap significantly on descent.
tactical_patterns: THOMAS Geraint attacked early on Iseran ascent, forcing rivals to respond and fragmenting GC group before summit.
ALAPHILIPPE Julian closed 2:07 deficit aggressively on Iseran descent before neutralization, showing descending strength traditionally rare for climbers.
Stage neutralization at summit timing point massively favored climbers over descenders, penalizing ALAPHILIPPE's risk-taking pursuit.

rider_signals.PINOT Thibaut: negative: Abandoned mid-stage with apparent knee injury on Col de Vars despite being genuine GC contender, catastrophic timing.
rider_signals.THOMAS Geraint: positive: Initiated decisive GC selection on Iseran by attacking before summit, showing form inconsistent with defending champion role.
rider_signals.ALAPHILIPPE Julian: positive: Descended Iseran at exceptional speed while 2+ minutes down, nearly neutralizing summit losses before weather intervention.
rider_signals.BERNAL Egan: positive: Gained yellow jersey via summit attack advantage, benefited from neutralization protocol favoring climbers over descenders.
